headline: Intel turns to next-generation ASML tool to help make its laptop chips
summary: Intel has decided to use a high-end machine from ASML to ‌manufacture some of its flagship Panther Lake laptop chips, ASML ‌said on Tuesday, a move that will help the chipmaker learn to use ​the tool more effectively.  Following experiments that began in 2024, Intel has begun to use ASML's next-generation high numerical aperture (High NA) extreme ultraviolet (EUV) machines, which print circuit patterns on to microchips, to help produce a ‌portion of its Panther ⁠Lake processors, ASML said.  The industry has debated at what point it makes economic sense to begin deploying the ⁠High NA tools, which likely will be needed by chipmakers in the future as they continue to shrink the atomic-sized features that ​make up ​chips.

The industry has debated at what point it makes economic sense to begin deploying the ⁠High NA tools, which likely will be needed by chipmakers in the future as they continue to shrink the atomic-sized features that ​make up ​chips.

headline: High NA EUV reaches new readiness milestone with first high-volume Logic product
summary: High NA EUV reaches new readiness milestone with first high-volume Logic product Intel Foundry has entered high-volume manufacturing for a subset of Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 3 processors, code-named Panther Lake, using ASML’s EXE High NA EUV technology Specific Intel 18A layers are now dual-qualified on High NA EUV in Oregon, with product shipping to customers at yields matched to the NXE platformIntel and ASML continue to closely collaborate on High NA EUV readiness with flexibility to incorpo

headline: ASML Holding (NasdaqGS:ASML) Lifts 2026 Outlook As Intel Puts High NA EUV To Work
summary: ASML Holding (NasdaqGS:ASML) reported strong Q2 2026 earnings and lifted its full year 2026 sales outlook. Intel has become the first chipmaker to put ASML's next generation High NA EUV lithography systems into production use. The company highlighted AI related demand as a key driver of equipment orders and utilization across its product portfolio. ASML Holding sits at the center of high end chip manufacturing, and the latest results illustrate how critical its tools are for leading...

headline: ASML (ENXTAM:ASML) Stock Looks Like A Bargain Even As Broader Checks Stay Mixed
summary: ASML Holding stock has delivered a strong 180.4% return over the past 5 years, yet its current valuation checks send a more measured message rather than a clear bargain signal. A 180.4% 5 year return highlights how strongly ASML Holding has rewarded long term shareholders, which naturally raises the bar for what counts as good value from here. Progress on High NA EUV deployment with Intel and continued demand for advanced lithography tools can support high expectations, while tighter export...
